ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the package */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the package */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the package (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "tour_length" INTEGER /* Length of the tour in days */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the package */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the package */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package is available for booking */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Details of the cancellation policy */,
  "inclusions" TEXT /* What is included in the package */,
  "exclusions" TEXT /* What is not included in the package */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for search and filtering */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the user interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, book, rate) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user (if applicable) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotional_content" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional content */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the content is associated with */,
  "content" TEXT /* Promotional content for the package (e.g., marketing copy, special offers) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotional content (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotional_content_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the review is for */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the company to the review */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_reviews_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
